scripts.build:react: npm run build -w @apizero/react && npm run build -w @apizero/react-ssr && npm run build -w @apizero/vite
scripts.build:ssr: npm run build:react && npm run build:ssr:example
scripts.ci:node: npm run build:react && npm run test:react && npm run typecheck:example && npm run build:client && npm run build:ssr:example
scripts.test:coverage:js: npm run build:react && npm run test -w @apizero/react -- --coverage --coverage.reporter=lcov --coverage.reportsDirectory=../../coverage/js/phoenix-react --coverage.thresholds.lines=85 && npm run test -w @apizero/react-ssr -- --coverage --coverage.reporter=lcov --coverage.reportsDirectory=../../coverage/js/phoenix-react-ssr --coverage.thresholds.lines=50 && npm run test -w @apizero/vite -- --coverage --coverage.reporter=lcov --coverage.reportsDirectory=../../coverage/js/phoenix-vite --coverage.thresholds.lines=75 && npm run test -w phoenix-blog-react-example -- --coverage --coverage.reporter=lcov --coverage.reportsDirectory=../../coverage/js/blog --coverage.thresholds.lines=25
scripts.test:e2e:ssr-csp: npm run build -w @apizero/react && npm run build -w @apizero/react-ssr && cargo test --locked -p phoenix-view --test react_ssr_csp -- --ignored
scripts.test:react: npm run test -w @apizero/react && npm run test -w @apizero/react-ssr && npm run test -w @apizero/vite && npm run test -w phoenix-blog-react-example
